title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Craftsvilla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
